title: Toy Guns with Soft Bullets, Green Plastic Toy Pistol for 14+, Education Foam Blaster Birthday Present for Outdoor Indoor Play，with 50 Soft Bullets
features: 【Toy gun with Accessories】This toy gun set is equipped with many accessories: 1 bullet clip, 50 soft foam, 8 empty bullets, and a muffler
【Material Safety】 The toy gun is made of plastic, and the bullets of the toy gun are made of EVA sponge, a soft and harmless material that can be played with confidence
【Exciting Experience 】 The toy gun pulls the slider after each shot, and the hollow bounces out, simulating the feeling of real shooting and providing an exciting and fun feeling
【Portable and Compact】 With a portable size, it can be carried around and played anywhere, but do not aim it at people's faces or eyes
【Ideal Gift】It is very suitable for users to use on birthdays, Christmas, New Year, Easter or other holidays, and is a great gift choice
